# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

- 200
              request_method:
                - GET
              content_type:
                - "application/json"
              cache_ttl: 300
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: proxy_cache

      # Public API - Get Single Resource (GET)
      - name: public-api-detail-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/resources/(?P<id>\d+)
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
          - http
        tags:
          - public
          - read-only

        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 60
              hour: 2000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true

      # Public API - Search Route
      - name: public-api-search-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/search
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - public
          - search

        plugins:
          # Very strict rate limiting for search to prevent abuse
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 15
              hour: 500
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              error_code: 429
              error_message: "Search rate limit exceeded. Maximum 15 searches per minute."

          # Request size limiting for search payloads
          - name: request-size-limiting
            config:
              allowed_payload_size: 1
              size_unit: megabytes
              require_content_length: false

  # ============================================
  # Internal API Service (Authenticated Users)
  # ============================================
  - name: internal-api-service
    url: http://internal-api-upstream:8002
    protocol: http
    host: internal-api-upstream
    port: 8002
    path: /api/v1/internal
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    tags:
      - internal
      - authenticated

    plugins:
      # Service-level CORS - restricted to internal web apps
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
            - "https://dashboard.example.com"
            - "http://localhost:3000"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Accept
            - X-API-Key
            - X-Request-ID
            - X-Correlation-ID
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Auth-Token
            - X-Request-ID
            - X-RateLimit-Limit
            - X-RateLimit-Remaining
            - X-RateLimit-Reset
          credentials: true
          max_age: 1800
          preflight_continue: false

      # JWT Authentication for internal service
      - name: jwt
        config:
          uri_param_names:
            - jwt
          header_names:
            - Authorization
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
            - nbf
          key_claim_name: iss
          secret_is_base64: false
          run_on_preflight: false
          maximum_expiration: 3600

      # ACL Plugin for role-based access at service level
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - internal-users
            - api-consumers
          deny:
            - blocked-users
          hide_groups_header: true

      # Service-level rate limiting for internal API
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 10000
          day: 200000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

      # Request transformer to add internal headers
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Internal-Service:true"
              - "X-Gateway-Version:1.0"

    routes:
      # Internal API - User Management
      - name: internal-user-management-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/internal/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - internal
          - user-management

        plugins:
          # Stricter rate limiting for user management
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 30
              hour: 500
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              error_code: 429
              error_message: "User management endpoint rate limit exceeded."

          # Request size limiting
          - name: request-size-limiting
            config:
              allowed_payload_size: 2
              size_unit: megabytes

      # Internal API - Data Export
      - name: internal-data-export-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/internal/export
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - internal
          - export

        plugins:
          # Very strict rate limiting for data export
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 5
              hour: 50
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              error_code: 429
              error_message: "Export rate limit exceeded. Maximum 5 exports per minute."

          # CORS override for export - allow Content-Disposition
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://app.example.com"
                - "https://dashboard.example.com"
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Accept
              exposed_headers:
                - Content-Disposition
                - Content-Length
                - X-Export-ID
              credentials: true
              max_age: 600

      # Internal API - Reports
      - name: internal-reports-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/internal/reports
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - internal
          - reports

        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 20
              hour: 200
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true

          - name: proxy-cache
            config:
              response_code:
                - 200
              request_method:
                - GET
              content_type:
                - "application/json"
              cache_ttl: 600
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: reports_cache

  # ============================================
  # Admin API Service
  # ============================================
  - name: admin-api-service
    url: http://admin-api-upstream:8003
    protocol: http
    host: admin-api-upstream
    port: 8003
    path: /api/v1/admin
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    tags:
      - admin
      - privileged

    plugins:
      # Service-level CORS - very restrictive for admin
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Accept
            - X-Admin-Token
            - X-Request-ID
            - X-2FA-Code
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Auth-Token
            - X-Request-ID
            - X-RateLimit-Remaining
          credentials: true
          max_age: 600
          preflight_continue: false

      # OAuth2 Authentication for admin service
      - name: oauth2
        config:
          scopes:
            - admin
            - admin:read
            - admin:write
            - admin:delete
          mandatory_scope: true
          provision_key: "admin-provision-key-change-in-production"
          token_expiration: 1800
          enable_authorization_code: true
          enable_client_credentials: true
          enable_implicit_grant: false
          enable_password_grant: false
          accept_http_if_already_terminated: true
          global_credentials: false
          auth_header_name: Authorization
          hide_credentials: true
          refresh_token_ttl: 86400

      # ACL for admin-only access
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - super-admins
            - admins
          hide_groups_header: true

      # Strict rate limiting for admin service
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 3000
          day: 50000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

      # IP restriction for admin service - allow only office IPs
      - name: ip-restriction
        config:
          allow:
            - "203.0.113.0/24"
            - "198.51.100.0/24"
            - "10.0.0.0/8"
          status: 403
          message: "Admin access is restricted to authorized networks only."

      # Request size limiting for admin
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 10
          size_unit: megabytes
          require_content_length: false

      # Response transformer to add security headers
      - name: response-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff"
              - "X-Frame-Options:DENY"
              - "X-XSS-Protection:1; mode=block"
              - "Strict-Transport-Security:max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
              - "Content-Security-Policy:default-src 'self'"
              - "Referrer-Policy:strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
              - "Cache-Control:no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate"

    routes:
      # Admin API - System Configuration
      - name: admin-system-config-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/config
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - admin
          - system-config

        plugins:
          # Very strict rate limiting for system configuration
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 10
              hour: 100
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              error_code: 429
              error_message: "Admin configuration rate limit exceeded."

      # Admin API - User Administration
      - name: admin-user-admin-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - admin
          - user-admin

        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 30
              hour: 500
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true

      # Admin API - Audit Logs (Read-Only)
      - name: admin-audit-logs-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/audit
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - admin
          - audit

        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 20
              hour: 300
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true

          # Override CORS for audit - read-only, stricter
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://admin.example.com"
              methods:
                - GET
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Accept
                - X-Admin-Token
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Total-Count
                - X-Page-Count
              credentials: true
              max_age: 300

  # ============================================
  # Webhook Service (Inbound Webhooks)
  # ============================================
  - name: webhook-service
    url: http://webhook-processor-upstream:8004
    protocol: http
    host: webhook-processor-upstream
    port: 8004
    path: /webhooks
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 10000
    read_timeout: 10000
    tags:
      - webhooks
      - inbound

    plugins:
      # CORS for webhook service - typically not needed but configured for testing
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
          methods:
            - POST
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - X-Webhook-Signature
            - X-Webhook-Timestamp
          credentials: false
          max_age: 300

      # HMAC Authentication for webhook verification
      - name: hmac-auth
        config:
          hide_credentials: true
          clock_skew: 300
          validate_request_body: true
          enforce_headers:
            - date
            - x-webhook-signature
          algorithms:
            - hmac-sha256
            - hmac-sha512

      # Rate limiting for webhooks
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 10000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true

      # Request size limiting for webhooks
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 5
          size_unit: megabytes

    routes:
      # Payment Webhook Route
      - name: payment-webhook-route
        paths:
          - /webhooks/payments
        methods:
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - webhooks
          - payments

        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 100
              hour: 5000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true

          # IP restriction for payment webhook provider
          - name: ip-restriction
            config:
              allow:
                - "54.187.174.169"
                - "54.187.205.235"
                - "54.187.216.72"
                - "54.241.31.99"
              status: 403
              message: "Webhook requests must originate from authorized payment provider IPs."

      # Notification Webhook Route
      - name: notification-webhook-route
        paths:
          - /webhooks/notifications
        methods:
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - webhooks
          - notifications

        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 200
              hour: 8000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true

# ============================================
# Consumers for API Key Authentication
# ============================================
consumers:
  - username: public-api-consumer
    custom_id: public-001
    tags:
      - public
      - tier-free
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "pk_live_public_api_key_change_me_in_production"
    acls:
      - group: api-consumers

  - username: internal-app-consumer
    custom_id: internal-001
    tags:
      - internal
      - tier-enterprise
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "sk_live_internal_api_key_change_me_in_production"
    acls:
      - group: internal-users
      - group: api-consumers

  - username: admin-consumer
    custom_id: admin-001
    tags:
      - admin
      - tier-enterprise
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "ak_live_admin_api_key_change_me_in_production"
    acls:
      - group: super-admins
      - group: admins
      - group: internal-users
      - group: api-consumers

  - username: mobile-app-consumer
    custom_id: mobile-001
    tags:
      - mobile
      - tier-standard
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "mk_live_mobile_api_key_change_me_in_production"
    acls:
      - group: api-consumers

  - username: partner-integration-consumer
    custom_id: partner-001
    tags:
      - partner
      - tier-standard
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "partner_live_api_key_change_me_in_production"
    acls:
      - group: api-consumers
    hmacauth_credentials:
      - username: partner-webhook-signer
        secret: "partner_hmac_secret_change_me_in_production"

# ============================================
# Upstreams with Health Checks
# ============================================
upstreams:
  - name: public-api-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 302
          interval: 10
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
          interval: 10
          timeouts: 3
        type: http
        timeout: 5
        http_path: /health
        concurrency: 10
      passive:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 204
          successes: 5
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: "public-api-1:8001"
        weight: 100
      - target: "public-api-2:8001"
        weight: 100

  - name: internal-api-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
          interval: 10
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
          interval: 10
          timeouts: 3
        type: http
        timeout: 5
        http_path: /health
        concurrency: 5
      passive:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 204
          successes: 5
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: "internal-api-1:8002"
        weight: 100
      - target: "internal-api-2:8002"
        weight: 100
      - target: "internal-api-3:8002"
        weight: 100

  - name: admin-api-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
          interval: 15
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
          interval: 10
          timeouts: 2
        type: http
        timeout: 5
        http_path: /health
        concurrency: 3
    targets:
      - target: "admin-api-1:8003"
        weight: 100

  - name: webhook-processor-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
          interval: 10
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
          interval: 10
          timeouts: 3
        type: http
        timeout: 5
        http_path: /health
        concurrency: 5
    targets:
      - target: "webhook-processor-1:8004"
        weight: 100
      - target: "webhook-processor-2:8004"
        weight: 100
